scores.correctness_notes: The agent completely skips the core content of the gold standard (the data schema: application-data with name/model/port, unit-data with host) and instead provides Python API code. The gold standard explicitly notes that charmlibs docs cover interface specs/data schemas, not library Python API. The agent answers a different aspect of the question than the gold standard targets.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several likely hallucinations: `self.ingress.is_ready()` method, `self.ingress.provide_ingress_requirements(port=9090)` method, `strip_prefix` constructor parameter, `IngressPerUnitRequirer` class, and `self.ingress.url` property — none of these are confirmed by the gold standard. The gold standard explicitly says the Python API is documented in the traefik-k8s-operator repo, not in charmlibs, making these details unverifiable from the authoritative source used. Also uses v2 library while gold standard recommends v1.
